nearest.name: St Peter's Church of England School

context.intro: GU2 covers the western residential suburbs of Guildford, including the Stoughton and Worplesdon Road areas in Surrey, South East England. It is predominantly a family-oriented residential district with good access to Guildford town centre and the A3.
context.priceVsCounty: The average property price in GU2 is £348,000, which is 7% above the Surrey average of £326,000, reflecting its desirable suburban character and strong local amenities.
context.priceVsNational: Properties in GU2 cost approximately 21% more than the England and Wales national average of £287,000.
context.priceTrend: House prices in GU2 have risen 7.1% over the past 12 months and 21.4% over five years.
context.crimeContext: GU2 has one of the lowest crime rates in the Guildford area, with 55.8 crimes per 1,000 residents — 31% below the national average. Violent crime and burglary rates are among the lowest in Surrey.
context.schoolContext: GU2 has 8 schools within or near its boundaries, including 2 Outstanding-rated and 5 Good-rated schools. The district is well-served for primary education in particular.
context.broadbandContext: Average broadband download speeds in GU2 are 68.1 Mbps, with 91% of premises having access to superfast broadband.
context.synthesis: GU2 offers a quieter, more suburban alternative to GU1 with lower property prices (£348,000), excellent safety credentials (31% below national crime average), and strong school provision. It appeals particularly to families seeking a residential setting with easy access to Guildford's amenities.
